# ixodocs

> Curated, LLM-optimized knowledge base of Ixopay and TokenEx payment platform documentation. 676 indexed markdown files across 4 documentation portals, with YAML frontmatter metadata and full-text search support.

Ixopay is a payment orchestration platform that enables merchants to process transactions across multiple payment service providers (PSPs) through a unified API. TokenEx is the tokenization and vault platform integrated into Ixopay's modules, providing PCI-compliant card tokenization, iFrame-based data collection, and transparent gateway proxying.

This repository contains the complete documentation from both platforms, scraped from their Docusaurus-based documentation site at documentation.ixopay.com, cleaned into structured markdown, and indexed for efficient retrieval by LLMs and developer tools.

## Navigation

- [Master Index](index.md): Complete map of all 676 documentation pages organized by portal, section, and topic. Start here to find any document.

## Ixopay Developer Hub (191 pages)

- [Reconciliation](docs/ixopay/guides/payments/after/reconciliation.md): Reconciliation — matching payment records with those of payment service providers.

- [Payouts](docs/ixopay/guides/payments/payouts.md): Payout transactions — transfer funds from merchant account to customer's account.
- [Refunds](docs/ixopay/guides/payments/refunds.md): Handling online payment refunds — merchant-initiated and processor-initiated types.
- [Saving](docs/ixopay/guides/payments/saving.md): How to save payment details for future transactions.
- [Getting production ready](docs/ixopay/guides/production.md): Getting production ready
- [Additional security](docs/ixopay/guides/production/additional-security.md): HMAC request signing, callback signature validation, and additional security measures.
- [Handling errors](docs/ixopay/guides/production/handling-errors.md): Getting production ready — Handling errors

- [Customer profiles](docs/ixopay/reference/features/customer-profiles.md): Customer profiles
- [Dcc](docs/ixopay/reference/features/dcc.md): Dynamic Currency Conversion DCC — allows customers to see transaction cost in their local currency.
- [Pay By Link](docs/ixopay/reference/features/pay-by-link.md): IXOPAY Pay-by-Link feature — create secure URLs for customers to access a payment page.
- [Payment method selection](docs/ixopay/reference/features/payment-method-selection.md): Payment method selection
- [Intermediate Redirects](docs/ixopay/reference/features/payment-method-selection/intermediate-redirects.md): Intermediate redirects for transactions processed through a Payment Selection Page.
- [Provisioning](docs/ixopay/reference/features/provisioning.md): The Provisioning API component of the IXOPAY platform.
- [3Ds Connector Configuration](docs/ixopay/reference/features/provisioning/3ds-connector-configuration.md): 3-D Secure connector configuration for integrating IXOPAY with 3-D Secure enabled connectors.
- [Risk checks](docs/ixopay/reference/features/risk-checks.md): Risk checks
- [External risk checks](docs/ixopay/reference/features/risk-checks/external.md): Risk checks — External risk checks
- [Forter](docs/ixopay/reference/features/risk-checks/external/forter.md): Forter external risk checks for enhancing transaction processing in IXOPAY.
- [Scheduler](docs/ixopay/reference/features/scheduler.md): Scheduler feature in IXOPAY — efficient management of recurring transactions.
- [PCI data migration](docs/ixopay/reference/features/tokenization/pci-data-migration.md): Tokenization & PCI — PCI data migration
- [Integration](docs/ixopay/reference/integration.md): Integration section — all information needed to integrate with the IXOPAY platform.
- [Callbacks](docs/ixopay/reference/integration/callbacks.md): Callbacks — notifications sent by IXOPAY as part of the payment processing workflow.
- [Callback data](docs/ixopay/reference/integration/callbacks/callback-data.md): Callback data
- [Notification Types](docs/ixopay/reference/integration/callbacks/notification-types.md): Overview of various notification types received from the IXOPAY payment processing platform.
- [Response handling](docs/ixopay/reference/integration/callbacks/response-handling.md): Response handling
- [Advanced guides](docs/ixopay/reference/integration/payment.js/advanced-guides.md): Hosted fields — payment.js — Advanced guides
- [Auto-fill card data](docs/ixopay/reference/integration/payment.js/advanced-guides/auto-fill-card-data.md): Hosted fields — payment.js — Advanced guides — Auto-fill card data
- [Cvv Refreshing](docs/ixopay/reference/integration/payment.js/advanced-guides/cvv-refreshing.md): CVV refreshing for previously tokenized cards via Register or Debit.
- [Form Styling](docs/ixopay/reference/integration/payment.js/advanced-guides/form-styling.md): Using setNumberStyle and setCvvStyle for form styling.
- [Error codes](docs/ixopay/reference/integration/payment.js/error-codes.md): Hosted fields — payment.js — Error codes
- [Event Listening](docs/ixopay/reference/integration/payment.js/event-listening.md): Events supported by number and CVV fields — input, focus, blur, mouseover, mouseout, enter, esc, tab, shift-tab.
- [Methods](docs/ixopay/reference/integration/payment.js/methods.md): Methods for initializing and using PaymentJs.
- [Processing options](docs/ixopay/reference/integration/processing-options.md): Processing options
- [Full Page Redirect](docs/ixopay/reference/integration/processing-options/full-page-redirect.md): Full-page redirects — redirects customer away from merchant site for payment processing.
- [Hosted Payment Pages](docs/ixopay/reference/integration/processing-options/hosted-payment-pages.md): Hosted payment pages — redirect customers to payment page hosted by IXOPAY.
- [Server-to-server](docs/ixopay/reference/integration/processing-options/server-to-server.md): Server-to-server processing options.

## Ixopay User Manual (136 pages)

### Manual

- [Bank Of America](docs/ixopay/manual/adapters/bank-of-america.md): The Bank of America Adapter in IXOPAY differs in behavior from an ordinary Adapter — does not directly communicate to a payment processor.
- [Scalapay](docs/ixopay/manual/adapters/scalapay.md): Configure parameters for the Scalapay Connector — Bearer Token and other settings.
- [SCB](docs/ixopay/manual/adapters/scb.md): Configure parameters for the SCB Connector — API Key Client ID and other settings.
- [Trust Payment / Secure Trading](docs/ixopay/manual/adapters/securetrading.md): Trust Payment / Secure Trading
- [Selfpay](docs/ixopay/manual/adapters/selfpay.md): Configure parameters for the Selfpay Connector — Username and other settings.
- [Sepa](docs/ixopay/manual/adapters/sepa.md): Configure parameters for the SepaExpress Connector — Username and other settings.
- [Shift4 / Finaro / Credorax](docs/ixopay/manual/adapters/shift4.md): Shift4 / Finaro / Credorax
- [Shopify](docs/ixopay/manual/adapters/shopify.md): Shopify does not process payments via IXOPAY directly — uses Shopify Payments.
- [SIA](docs/ixopay/manual/adapters/sia.md): Configure parameters for the SIA Creditcard Connector — Vault Configuration.
- [Silverflow](docs/ixopay/manual/adapters/silverflow.md): Configure parameters for the Silverflow Creditcard Connector — Vault Configuration.
- [Simulator / OfflineInvoice / OfflinePayment / SepaDummy / RiskCheckOnly](docs/ixopay/manual/adapters/simulator.md): Simulator / OfflineInvoice / OfflinePayment / SepaDummy / RiskCheckOnly
- [Six / PAYONE](docs/ixopay/manual/adapters/six.md): Six / PAYONE
- [Skrill](docs/ixopay/manual/adapters/skrill.md): Configure parameters for the Skrill Connector — Merchant Account E-mail and other settings.
- [Sofort](docs/ixopay/manual/adapters/sofort.md): Configure iDeal/Sofort via Sofort Merchant Account.
- [Softbank](docs/ixopay/manual/adapters/softbank.md): Configure parameters for the Softbank QR Payments Connector — Preauthorize Merchant ID and other settings.
- [Straal](docs/ixopay/manual/adapters/straal.md): Configure parameters for the Straal Connector — Straal API Key.
- [Straight2Bank](docs/ixopay/manual/adapters/straight2bank.md): Configure parameters for the Straight2Bank Connector — Corp ID and other settings.

- [Stuzza](docs/ixopay/manual/adapters/stuzza.md): Configure parameters for the Stuzza Connector — User ID and other settings.

- [Encrypt Function](docs/ixopay/modules/tokenex/encrypt-function.md): Encrypt data within the request body — data may include a token identified by token notation.

- [Get Asset](docs/ixopay/modules/tokenex/get-asset.md): Retrieve card assets such as card imagery and issuer icons identified by GUIDs.
- [Get Card Metadata](docs/ixopay/modules/tokenex/get-card-metadata.md): Retrieve metadata for a credit card — card art, issuer information, card metadata and token metadata.
- [Get Kount Hash Value And Tokenize 1](docs/ixopay/modules/tokenex/get-kount-hash-value-and-tokenize-1.md): Generate a Kount hash value for fraud validation and return a TokenEx token.
- [Get Kount Hash Value](docs/ixopay/modules/tokenex/get-kount-hash-value.md): Generate a Kount hash value for fraud validation of a given PAN.
- [Get Payment Bundle](docs/ixopay/modules/tokenex/get-payment-bundle.md): Retrieve a cryptogram for an existing TokenEx token that has a network token associated with it.
- [Get Status](docs/ixopay/modules/tokenex/get-status.md): Retrieve the status of a network token — INACTIVE, ACTIVE, SUSPENDED, etc.
- [Getkountriskresult](docs/ixopay/modules/tokenex/getkountriskresult.md): Get Kount risk result via REST API.
- [HMAC Examples](docs/ixopay/modules/tokenex/hmac-examples.md): Transparent Gateway API v1 — Payload HMAC — HMAC Examples

- [Lifecycle Management](docs/ixopay/modules/tokenex/lifecycle-management.md): Change status of a network token — DELETETOKEN, RESUMETOKEN, SUSPENDTOKEN actions.
- [Mastercard Identity Check Insights](docs/ixopay/modules/tokenex/mastercard-identity-check-insights.md): Mastercard Identity Check Insights IDCI — frictionless requests with reduced latency and no challenge.
- [Mobile Bin Lookup](docs/ixopay/modules/tokenex/mobile-bin-lookup.md): BIN lookup subscription service — contact Customer Success Manager for access.

- [Network Tokenization API](docs/ixopay/modules/tokenex/network-token-services.md): Network tokenization — Network Tokenization API

- [Use Network Token Function](docs/tokenex/use-network-token-function.md): Insert a network token and/or network token expiration date into the request body.
- [Using Custom Data Types](docs/tokenex/using-custom-data-types.md): TokenEx iFrame — Using Custom Data Types
- [Using the iFrame](docs/tokenex/using-the-iframe.md): TokenEx iFrame — Using the iFrame
- [Validate Token](docs/tokenex/validate-token.md): ValidateToken — verify the specified token exists within your token vault. (API v1 deprecated)
- [Vault API Key & Permission Management](docs/tokenex/vault-api-key-permissions.md): Reseller API — Vault API Key & Permission Management
- [Vault Management](docs/tokenex/vault-management.md): Reseller API — Vault Management
- [Welcome!](docs/tokenex/welcome.md): Getting started
- [What is Tokenization?](docs/tokenex/what-is-tokenization.md): Getting started — What is Tokenization?

### Payment Services

- [Adyen Checkout](docs/tokenex/payment-services/adyen-direct.md): Payment Services — Card/Check/Wallet API — Adyen Checkout Gateway Parameters

- [Stripe](docs/tokenex/payment-services/stripe.md): Payment Services — Card/Check/Wallet API — Stripe Gateway Parameters
